title: A Single Fossil Bone Reveals Giant Snakes, Mammoths and Saber-Toothed Cats Once Roamed Taiwan
description: Miami, UNITED STATES: A 12-foot (3.65m) Burmese python that was captured in the backyard of a home slithers on the ground at its new home at the A.D. Barnes Park 10 October 2005, in south Miami, FL. The snake was captured 09 October and is the prime suspect in the disappearance of a 15-pound (6.8kg) cat that lived at the residence. AFP PHOTO/Robert SULLIVAN (Photo credit should read ROBERT SULLIVAN/AFP via Getty Images)

description: The historical structure is Italy’s most popular tourist destination, with nine million visitors in 2025 alone.

title: Why some people still believe that aliens shaped ancient civilizations
description: Could ancient humans really have built the pyramids without extraterrestrial help? Or do such questions reveal more about modern anxieties than the past itself?
